verdicts.description: Worker must wear safety gloves before handling any electrical components.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker has safety gloves visibly on both hands before touching any electrical component.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker begins handling electrical components at 00:00:05 with bare hands. No gloves are visible throughout the first segment.

verdicts.description: Inspect workstation for any loose cables or obstructions before starting.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker visually scans the workstation surface and removes any visible obstructions.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker performs a clear visual sweep of the workstation at 00:00:30 before proceeding.

verdicts.description: Inspect all cable connectors for visible damage before connecting to the control board.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker visually inspects each cable connector before connecting it to the board.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker retrieves cables and connects them directly to the control board without performing any visible inspection of the connectors.

verdicts.description: Mount the control board onto the chassis using four M3 screws.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker secures control board with all four M3 screws tightened.
verdicts.reasoning: All four screws are installed and tightened in the correct positions at 00:02:10.

verdicts.description: Connect the power ribbon cable to the control board port J1.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker connects ribbon cable firmly into port J1 with locking tab audibly clicked.
verdicts.reasoning: Ribbon cable connected to J1 at 00:02:45. Locking tab engagement visible from camera angle.

verdicts.description: Apply thermal paste to the processor heat sink contact surface before mounting.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker applies a pea-sized amount of thermal paste to the processor contact surface before mounting the heat sink.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker mounts heat sink directly onto processor at 00:03:42 without applying any thermal paste. No thermal paste tube visible in the workstation area.

verdicts.description: Secure the heat sink with two retaining clips on opposite sides.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker clips both retaining clips onto the heat sink securely.
verdicts.reasoning: Both retaining clips secured correctly at 00:04:20.

verdicts.description: Run POST diagnostic for 30 seconds to confirm board is functioning.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker initiates POST diagnostic and waits the full 30 seconds before proceeding.
verdicts.reasoning: POST diagnostic initiated at 00:05:00 and completed at 00:05:31. Duration constraint met.

verdicts.description: Affix the quality control label to the bottom-left corner of the control board enclosure.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker places QC label in the bottom-left corner of the enclosure.
verdicts.reasoning: QC label is affixed to the bottom-right corner instead of the specified bottom-left corner at 00:06:10.
